## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and why the change is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Relevant Rust checks
- [ ] Manual desktop behavior checked when applicable

## Safety and privacy

- [ ] No telemetry, cloud sync, credential access, browser cookie access, or traffic interception was added.
- [ ] No arbitrary shell, process-control, keyboard, or window-control interface was added.
- [ ] New native permissions are minimal and documented.
